posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all,
The monday.com marketplace team added the option to control the order of automations the app which is great!

I’m asking for a slight change in the mechanism -
Right now the way the mechanism works is by switching between automations and it would be SOOO much better if it would “push” the automation next to it.

Why is this problematic -
Let’s assume we have an app with 20 automation.
We’ve added a new automation which is now number 21 and we want it to be number 2.
We have to switch number 21 with number 2, the issue is that now number 2, that ideally would be number 3, is now number 21.
So we switch 21 with 3, and so on and so forth that in order to arrange every automation back its right place we need to go through every single automation.
This is quite cumbersome, especially with apps that have many automations.

Feeling the same? Upvote this!

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Fantasy-Media-Team snap!

Make integration recipe reordering intuitive Feature Requests - API and Apps Framework
If you have a lot of recipe sentences and create a new one, the new one can appear anywhere in the order. I’m normally seeing the new one appearing either at the first or last position, but not always. If you have say 20 recipe sentences and need to move the new one at say position 20 to position 10 and move 10-19 to places 11-20, then you are in a world of pain. Logically you’d think that moving #20 to #10 would be the way to do that, but no #10 becomes #20 & #20 becomes #10. The actual way …
